title: Ruhroh Sample Evidence Pack
description: Small docs sample that demonstrates compare, claim readiness, and artifact links.

methodology.retryPolicy: Docs sample only; real claims should collect the full planned run set.

governance.contaminationReview: Docs sample uses synthetic fixture artifacts.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Docs sample is not a publishable benchmark claim.
reviewChecklist: Inspect report links, claim readiness, and remediation output.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Regenerate with scripts/generate-docs-samples.mjs when report contracts change.
